channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: santifer/career-ops
item.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

item.title: safishamsi/graphify
item.description: Claude Code skill. Drop code, papers, images, or notes into a folder and get a knowledge graph with community detection, god nodes, and honest audit trail.

item.title: afar1/fieldtheory-cli
item.description: Sync and locally store all of your X/Twitter bookmarks. Free and open source CLI for Mac.

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 75% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex
item.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

item.title: k2-fsa/OmniVoice
item.description: High-Quality Voice Cloning TTS for 600+ Languages

item.title: stirling-image/stirling-image
item.description: Stirling-PDF but for images. 30+ tools and local AI in a single Docker container - resize, compress, remove backgrounds, upscale, OCR, and more. No cloud, no telemetry. Your images never leave your machine.

item.title: 0xGF/boneyard
item.description: Auto generated skeleton loading framework

item.title: kevinrgu/autoagent
item.description: autonomous harness engineering

item.title: HKUDS/OpenHarness
item.description: "OpenHarness: Open Agent Harness"

item.title: ultraworkers/claw-code-parity
item.description: claw-code Rust port parity work - it is temporary work while claw-code repo is doing migration

item.title: ultraworkers/claw-code
item.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Better Harness Tools that make real things done. Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

item.title: ultraworkers/claw-code
item.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Better Harness Tools that make real things done. Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

item.title: ultraworkers/claw-code
item.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Better Harness Tools that make real things done. Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
item.description: Collection of DESIGN.md files that capture design systems from popular websites. Drop one into your project and let coding agents build matching UI.

item.title: dominikmartn/nothing-design-skill
item.description: A Claude Code skill for generating UI in the Nothing design language. Monochrome, typographic, industrial.

item.title: sanbuphy/learn-coding-agent
item.description: Research on Coding Agents

item.title: Kuberwastaken/claurst
item.description: Your favorite Terminal Coding Agent, now in Rust & a Breakdown of the Claude Code leak & discoveries

item.title: motiful/cc-gateway
item.description: AI API identity gateway — reverse proxy that normalizes device fingerprints and telemetry for privacy-preserving API proxying

item.title: codeany-ai/open-agent-sdk-typescript
item.description: Agent-SDK without CLI dependencies, as an alternative to claude-agent-sdk, completely open source

item.title: Gitlawb/openclaude
item.description: Claude Code opened to any LLM — OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible API shim

item.title: Kuberwastaken/claurst
item.description: Your favorite Terminal Coding Agent, now in Rust & a Breakdown of the Claude Code leak & discoveries

item.title: jarmuine/claude-code
item.description: Fork of instructkr/claude-code

item.title: instructkr/claw-code
item.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 50K stars ⭐, reaching the milestone in just 2 hours after publication. Better Harness Tools, not merely storing the archive of leaked Claude Code but make real things done. Now rewriting in Rust using oh-my-codex.

item.title: instructkr/claw-code
item.description: The fastest repo in history to surpass 50K stars ⭐, reaching the milestone in just 2 hours after publication. Better Harness Tools, not merely storing the archive of leaked Claude Code but make real things done. Now rewriting in Rust using oh-my-codex.

item.title: sanbuphy/claude-code-source-code

item.title: NanmiCoder/claude-code-haha
item.description: Claude Code leaked source - locally runnable version

item.title: Kuberwastaken/claude-code
item.description: Claude Code in Rust & a Breakdown of How it Works

item.title: shipany-ai/open-agent-sdk
item.description: Agent-SDK without CLI dependencies, as an alternative to claude-agent-sdk, completely open source

item.title: paoloanzn/free-code
item.description: The free build of Claude Code. All telemetry removed, security-prompt guardrails stripped, all experimental features enabled.

item.title: luongnv89/claude-howto
item.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

item.title: chatgptprojects/clear-code
item.description: https://x.com/paidev

item.title: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent
item.description: Production-grade multi-agent orchestration framework. Model-agnostic, supports team collaboration, task scheduling, and inter-agent communication.

item.title: oboard/claude-code-rev
item.description: Runnable ClaudeCode source code

item.title: openedclaude/claude-reviews-claude
item.description: 🪞 An AI reading its own source code. Claude's architectural analysis of Claude Code

item.title: Leonxlnx/claude-code-system-prompts
item.description: Research into how agentic AI coding assistants work — reconstructed prompt patterns, agent coordination, and security classification

item.title: instructkr/claude-code
item.description: An independent Python feature port of Claude Code, entirely rewritting from scratch using oh-my-codex. Educational Purpose only.

item.title: ChinaSiro/claude-code-sourcemap
item.description: (no description)

item.title: drona23/claude-token-efficient
item.description: Universal CLAUDE.md - cut Claude output tokens by 63%. Drop-in. No code changes.

item.title: ghostwright/phantom
item.description: An AI co-worker with its own computer. Self-evolving, persistent memory, MCP server, secure credential collection, email identity. Built on the Claude Agent SDK.

item.title: openai/codex-plugin-cc
item.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: TheTom/turboquant_plus
item.description: (no description)

item.title: dreddnafious/thereisnospoon
item.description: A machine learning primer built from first principles. For engineers who want to reason about ML systems the way they reason about software systems.

item.title: yetone/voice-input-src
item.description: (no description)

item.title: productdevbook/hucre
item.description: Zero-dependency spreadsheet engine. Read & write XLSX, CSV, ODS. Pure TypeScript, works everywhere.

item.title: legalize-dev/legalize-es
item.description: Spanish legislation as a Git repo — every law is a Markdown file, every reform a commit. 8,600+ laws.

item.title: walkinglabs/awesome-harness-engineering
item.description: 🛠️ Awesome tools & guides for harness engineering.
